name: passwd-shadow-empty-password-check
command: clear; echo 'ROW 05 identity and empty passwords'; echo 'COMMAND: /etc/passwd and /etc/shadow password states'; echo '--- passwd users ---'; awk -F: '{print $1":uid="$3":shell="$7}' /etc/passwd; echo '--- shadow status ---'; awk -F: '{if($2=="") s="EMPTY"; else if($2 ~ /^[!*]/) s="LOCKED"; else s="SET"; print $1":"s}' /etc/shadow; echo '--- empty password accounts ---'; awk -F: '$2=="" {print $1}' /etc/shadow; echo 'END ROW 05'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 05 empty password evidence'; echo '--- shadow password states ---'; awk -F: '{if($2=="") s="EMPTY"; else if($2 ~ /^[!*]/) s="LOCKED"; else s="SET"; print $1":"s}' /etc/shadow; echo '--- empty password accounts ---'; awk -F: '$2=="" {print $1}' /etc/shadow

name: login-defs-password-policy
command: clear; echo 'ROW 06 password policy'; echo 'COMMAND: /etc/login.defs and PAM password quality'; echo '--- full /etc/login.defs ---'; cat /etc/login.defs 2>/dev/null || true; echo '--- /etc/security/pwquality.conf key settings ---'; grep -nE '^\s*#?\s*(minlen|minclass|dcredit|ucredit|lcredit|ocredit)\b' /etc/security/pwquality.conf 2>/dev/null || true; echo '--- PAM password quality lines ---'; grep -RnsE 'pam_(pwquality|cracklib)\.so|remember=|retry=|minlen=|minclass=|dcredit=|ucredit=|lcredit=|ocredit=' /etc/pam.d/system-auth /etc/pam.d/password-auth /etc/pam.d/common-password 2>/dev/null || true; echo 'END ROW 06'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 06 password policy key evidence'; echo '--- login.defs PASS settings ---'; grep -nE '^\s*PASS_(MAX_DAYS|MIN_DAYS|MIN_LEN|WARN_AGE)\b' /etc/login.defs 2>/dev/null || true; echo '--- password complexity key settings ---'; grep -nE '^\s*#?\s*(minlen|minclass|dcredit|ucredit|lcredit|ocredit)\b' /etc/security/pwquality.conf 2>/dev/null || true; grep -RnsE 'pam_(pwquality|cracklib)\.so|remember=|retry=|minlen=|minclass=|dcredit=|ucredit=|lcredit=|ocredit=' /etc/pam.d/system-auth /etc/pam.d/password-auth /etc/pam.d/common-password 2>/dev/null || true

name: login-failure-lock-policy
command: clear; echo 'ROW 10 login failure handling'; echo 'COMMAND: PAM faillock/tally settings'; grep -RnsE 'pam_(faillock|tally2)\.so|deny=|unlock_time|fail_interval|even_deny_root' /etc/pam.d/system-auth /etc/pam.d/password-auth /etc/pam.d/common-auth /etc/security/faillock.conf 2>/dev/null || true; echo 'END ROW 10'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 10 login failure handling key evidence'; grep -RnsE 'pam_(faillock|tally2)\.so|deny=|unlock_time|fail_interval|even_deny_root' /etc/pam.d/system-auth /etc/pam.d/password-auth /etc/pam.d/common-auth /etc/security/faillock.conf 2>/dev/null || true

name: ssh-and-telnet-check
command: clear; echo 'ROW 11 remote management protocol'; echo 'COMMAND: sshd/telnet service and listening ports'; (systemctl status sshd 2>/dev/null || service sshd status 2>/dev/null || true); echo '--- ssh/telnet listening ports ---'; (ss -lntp 2>/dev/null || netstat -lntp 2>/dev/null || true) | grep -E ':(22|23)\b|sshd|telnet' || true; echo '--- telnet packages/services ---'; (rpm -qa 2>/dev/null | grep -Ei 'telnet|xinetd' || true); echo 'END ROW 11'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 11 SSH/Telnet key evidence'; (systemctl is-active sshd 2>/dev/null || service sshd status 2>/dev/null || true); (ss -lntp 2>/dev/null || netstat -lntp 2>/dev/null || true) | grep -E ':(22|23)\b|sshd|telnet' || true; rpm -qa 2>/dev/null | grep -Ei 'telnet|xinetd' || true

name: unique-user-and-uid-check
command: clear; echo 'ROW 12 unique usernames and UIDs'; echo '--- duplicate names ---'; awk -F: '{count[$1]++} END {for (name in count) if (count[name] > 1) print name":"count[name]}' /etc/passwd; echo '--- duplicate UIDs ---'; awk -F: '{count[$3]++; users[$3]=users[$3]","$1} END {for (uid in count) if (count[uid] > 1) print uid users[uid]}' /etc/passwd; echo '--- passwd users ---'; awk -F: '{print $1":uid="$3":gid="$4}' /etc/passwd; echo 'END ROW 12'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 12 unique usernames and UIDs key evidence'; echo '--- duplicate names ---'; awk -F: '{count[$1]++} END {for (name in count) if (count[name] > 1) print name":"count[name]}' /etc/passwd; echo '--- duplicate UIDs ---'; awk -F: '{count[$3]++; users[$3]=users[$3]","$1} END {for (uid in count) if (count[uid] > 1) print uid users[uid]}' /etc/passwd; echo '--- user uid list ---'; awk -F: '{print $1":uid="$3}' /etc/passwd | head -40

name: passwd-shadow-permission-check
command: clear; echo 'ROW 14 passwd and shadow permissions'; echo 'COMMAND: stat and ls -l'; stat -c '%a %U %G %n' /etc/passwd /etc/shadow 2>/dev/null || true; ls -l /etc/passwd /etc/shadow 2>/dev/null || true; echo 'END ROW 14'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 14 passwd/shadow permission key evidence'; stat -c '%a %U %G %n' /etc/passwd /etc/shadow 2>/dev/null || true; ls -l /etc/passwd /etc/shadow 2>/dev/null || true

name: default-account-restriction-check
command: clear; echo 'ROW 17 default account restrictions'; echo 'COMMAND: passwd status and default account shells'; for u in root daemon bin adm lp sync shutdown halt mail operator games ftp nobody; do passwd -S $u 2>/dev/null || true; done; echo '--- default account passwd entries ---'; grep -E '^(root|daemon|bin|adm|lp|sync|shutdown|halt|mail|operator|games|ftp|nobody):' /etc/passwd 2>/dev/null || true; echo 'END ROW 17'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 17 default account key evidence'; for u in root daemon bin adm lp sync shutdown halt mail operator games ftp nobody; do passwd -S $u 2>/dev/null || true; done; grep -E '^(root|daemon|bin|adm|lp|sync|shutdown|halt|mail|operator|games|ftp|nobody):' /etc/passwd 2>/dev/null || true

name: extra-expired-shared-account-check
command: clear; echo 'ROW 18 unnecessary or shared accounts'; echo 'COMMAND: interactive shell accounts'; awk -F: '$7 !~ /(nologin|false|sync|shutdown|halt)$/ {print $1":"$3":"$6":"$7}' /etc/passwd; echo 'END ROW 18'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 18 interactive shell accounts key evidence'; awk -F: '$7 !~ /(nologin|false|sync|shutdown|halt)$/ {print $1":"$3":"$6":"$7}' /etc/passwd

name: auditd-service-status-check
command: clear; echo 'ROW 19 audit scope service status'; echo 'COMMAND: auditd service status'; (systemctl status auditd 2>/dev/null || service auditd status 2>/dev/null || true); echo 'END ROW 19'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 19 auditd service key evidence'; systemctl status auditd --no-pager 2>/dev/null | head -25 || service auditd status 2>/dev/null || true

name: audit-events-and-rules-check
command: clear; echo 'ROW 20 audit event content'; echo 'COMMAND: auditd process, auditctl status and rules'; ps -ef | grep '[a]uditd' || true; auditctl -s 2>/dev/null || true; echo '--- audit rules ---'; auditctl -l 2>/dev/null || true; echo 'END ROW 20'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 20 audit event key evidence'; ps -ef | grep '[a]uditd' || true; auditctl -s 2>/dev/null || true; echo '--- audit rules ---'; auditctl -l 2>/dev/null | head -40 || true

name: audit-record-fields-check
command: clear; echo 'ROW 21 audit record fields'; echo 'COMMAND: auditd.conf and audit rules files'; cat /etc/audit/auditd.conf 2>/dev/null || true; echo '--- audit.rules ---'; cat /etc/audit/audit.rules 2>/dev/null || true; echo '--- rules.d ---'; cat /etc/audit/rules.d/*.rules 2>/dev/null || true; echo 'END ROW 21'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 21 audit record key evidence'; grep -nE '^(log_format|name_format|flush|freq|num_logs|max_log_file|space_left_action|admin_space_left_action)' /etc/audit/auditd.conf 2>/dev/null || true; echo '--- audit rules head ---'; (cat /etc/audit/audit.rules /etc/audit/rules.d/*.rules 2>/dev/null || true) | grep -v '^#' | head -45

name: minimal-install-services-ports-check
command: clear; echo 'ROW 22 minimal install services and ports'; echo 'COMMAND: running services and listening ports'; systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running --no-pager 2>/dev/null || service --status-all 2>&1 | grep -E 'running|\[ \+ \]' || true; echo '--- listening ports ---'; (ss -lntup 2>/dev/null || netstat -lntup 2>/dev/null || true); echo 'END ROW 22'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 22 services and ports key evidence'; systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running --no-pager 2>/dev/null | head -45 || service --status-all 2>&1 | grep -E 'running|\[ \+ \]' | head -45 || true; echo '--- listening ports ---'; (ss -lntup 2>/dev/null || netstat -lntup 2>/dev/null || true) | head -35

name: terminal-login-source-restriction-check
command: clear; echo 'ROW 23 terminal access restrictions'; echo 'COMMAND: hosts.allow hosts.deny sshd_config access rules'; echo '--- /etc/hosts.allow ---'; cat /etc/hosts.allow 2>/dev/null || true; echo '--- /etc/hosts.deny ---'; cat /etc/hosts.deny 2>/dev/null || true; echo '--- sshd_config access controls ---'; grep -nE '^\s*(AllowUsers|DenyUsers|AllowGroups|DenyGroups|ListenAddress|Match|PermitRootLogin|PasswordAuthentication)\b' /etc/ssh/sshd_config 2>/dev/null || true; echo 'END ROW 23'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 23 terminal access restriction key evidence'; echo '--- hosts.allow/deny effective lines ---'; grep -nEv '^\s*(#|$)' /etc/hosts.allow /etc/hosts.deny 2>/dev/null || true; echo '--- sshd_config access controls ---'; grep -nE '^\s*(AllowUsers|DenyUsers|AllowGroups|DenyGroups|ListenAddress|Match|PermitRootLogin|PasswordAuthentication)\b' /etc/ssh/sshd_config 2>/dev/null || true

name: terminal-timeout-lock-check
command: clear; echo 'ROW 24 terminal timeout lock'; echo 'COMMAND: TMOUT settings'; grep -RnsE '^\s*(export\s+)?TMOUT\s*=' /etc/profile /etc/bashrc /etc/profile.d/*.sh /root/.bash_profile /root/.bashrc 2>/dev/null || true; echo 'END ROW 24'
screenshotCommand: clear; echo 'ROW 24 TMOUT key evidence'; grep -RnsE '^\s*(export\s+)?TMOUT\s*=' /etc/profile /etc/bashrc /etc/profile.d/*.sh /root/.bash_profile /root/.bashrc 2>/dev/null || true
